import responses

@responses.activate
def test_fetch_prices():
    # Correct: outbound HTTP calls are mocked to ensure test reliability
    responses.add(responses.GET, "https://api.coinbase.com/v2/prices/BTC-USD/spot",
                  json={"data": {"amount": "50000"}}, status=200)
    
    resp = requests.get("https://api.coinbase.com/v2/prices/BTC-USD/spot")
    assert resp.json()["data"]["amount"] == "50000"
